Hero.body: Genuine & aftermarket spare parts for JCB, CAT, Komatsu, Hitachi, Volvo, L&T Case & BEML. Serving contractors, mechanics & dealers across India.

About.heading: About New Gayatri Earthmovers
About.p1: New Gayatri Earthmovers is a leading supplier of genuine and aftermarket spare parts for all major earthmoving machinery brands. Based in Ghaziabad, UP, we have been serving construction contractors, machine owners, mechanics, and dealers across India for 21+ years.
About.p2: We stock over 10,000+ parts for JCB, CAT, Komatsu, Hitachi, L&T Case, Volvo, and BEML machines — available at competitive prices with bulk and wholesale discounts.
About.p3: Whether you need a single replacement part or a bulk order for your fleet, we deliver fast across all of India.

WhyUs.heading: Why Choose New Gayatri Earthmovers?
WhyUs.oemDesc: Genuine and compatible parts for all brands
WhyUs.deliveryDesc: Fast shipping to all states across India
WhyUs.wholesaleDesc: Special bulk rates for dealers & contractors
